items.title: If I Could Only Buy 1 S&P 500 Stock From Each Sector for the Rest of 2025, I'd Go With These 11 Dividend Stocks
items.description: Incorporating top stocks from a variety of sectors can be an effective way to balance out an investment portfolio.

items.title: This Billionaire Was Scooping Up Shares of Amazon and Alphabet in Q2. Should Investors Follow Suit and Buy the Stocks?
items.description: Bill Ackman doesn't hold that many companies in Pershing Square Capital's portfolio, so when he buys shares, it's worth taking note.

items.title: Amazon AGI Labs chief defends his reverse acquihire
items.description: The former Adept CEO said he hopes to be "remembered more as "an AI research innovator" than a "a deal structure innovator."

items.title: Prediction: This Quantum Computing Stock Will Still Be Worth More Than Berkshire Hathaway, Palantir, and Tesla Combined in 2030
items.description: Quantum computing could become the next frontier of the artificial intelligence revolution.

items.title: Bill Ackman Invests $1.27 Billion in Amazon, Adds To Google and More
items.description: Bill Ackman has made a hefty investment in Amazon, pouring in more than $1.27 billion within a span of three months.
